name: Smoky Beef and Black Eyed Peas
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces pkg. dried black-eyed peas, rinsed/picked over
11 1/2 ounces can bean with bacon soup
3 pounds beef chuck roast, trimmed of fat
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 5-6 quart electric slow cooker, mix together the beans, undiluted soup, hot water, carrots, onions, garlic powder and seasoned salt.
2. Place the roast on top.
3. Press into the bean mixture to cover as much as possible.
4. Cover and cook on the Low heat setting for 9-10 hours, or until the beef and beans are tender.
5. Increase the heat setting to High. Stir in the liquid smoke, chiles, and bell pepper.
6. Cook, uncovered on High for 10-15 minutes longer.
7. Skim any excess fat from the top before serving.
